examples: To sum up: a system of conservation based solely on economic self-interest is hopelessly lopsided.
His suit had shoulders that made him look lopsided.
The article presents a somewhat lopsided view of events.
Every game figured to be as lopsided as Game 1, which the Penguins won, 5-0.
Despite the lopsided shot count, Reimer wasn't critical of his teammates in front of him.
